arts.ttl: Man United 'could' use struggling forward 'to land' Napoli goal machine Victor Osimhen this summer
arts.sum: Napoli allegedly want Manchester United forward Rasmus Hojlund amid suggestions that Victor Osimhen could be on his way to Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Cristiano Ronaldo replaced me for his Man United debut - this is what stood out about him
arts.sum: Manchester United legend Nicky Butt has recalled being substituted for Cristiano Ronaldo's debut in 2003 and shared his standout memories from their time together as team-mates

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim rushes to defence of underfire Man Utd forward
arts.sum: Rasmus Hojlund's goalscoring woes at Manchester United show no sign of abating.

arts.ttl: Manchester United £85m flop could open door for Ruben Amorim to 'ready-made' striker transfer
arts.sum: Man United have plenty of work to do in the summer transfer window but Antony could offer an unexpected solution to Ruben Amorim's team.

arts.ttl: Man United vs. Ipswich: Red Devils at risk of unwanted club record against Tractor Boys
arts.sum: Manchester United are in danger of setting an unwanted club record when they continue their Premier League campaign against Ipswich Town.

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Casemiro 'makes feelings clear' on Red Devils exit as club are made to pay for questionable signing
arts.sum: Manchester United midfielder Casemiro is allegedly 'increasingly likely' to stay at Old Trafford until his lucrative contract expires in the summer of 2026.

arts.ttl: Man Utd open talks for ‘new Virgil van Dijk’
arts.sum: Manchester United have opened talks to sign RB Leipzig defensive star Castello Lukeba. That is according to Sacha Tovalieri, who reports that United have opened negotiations with the entourage of Lukeba ahead of the summer transfer market.
